task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the security project brief.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/security_brief.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent opens Blender and loads the FZK-Haus architectural model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender interface is visible with the FZK-Haus 3D model loaded in the viewport and its elements listed in the Outliner.

task_completion.description: Agent models card readers with the correct IFC class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: New objects assigned the 'IfcSecurityAppliance' class are visible in the Blender outliner, object properties, or BIM properties panel.

task_completion.description: Agent models CCTV cameras with the correct IFC class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: New objects assigned the 'IfcCommunicationsAppliance' or 'IfcSensor' class are visible in the Blender outliner, object properties, or BIM properties panel.

task_completion.description: Agent organizes the devices into a logical distribution system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distribution system or group named 'Security System' is visible in the BlenderBIM Systems/Groups panel, containing the newly created devices.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the updated IFC project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog in Blender showing the path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_security_system.ifc', or a file manager/terminal showing the newly created file at this location.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Blender software to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active use of the Blender interface, such as navigating the 3D viewport, using the Outliner, or interacting with the BlenderBIM add-on panels.

integrity.description: Agent modified the actual FZK-Haus model rather than an empty project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The architectural elements of the FZK-Haus building are visible in the 3D viewport alongside the newly added security devices.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply create a dummy file to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file 'fzk_security_system.ifc' is generated via Blender's save/export functionality, not by using 'touch' or a basic text editor in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must read the security brief at '/home/ga/Desktop/security_brief.txt'. The expected output file is '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_security_system.ifc'. The agent must create a distribution system named 'Security System'. The required devices to be modeled are exactly 2 'IfcSecurityAppliance' (card readers) and 2 'IfcCommunicationsAppliance' or 'IfcSensor' (CCTV cameras).
